Apply ALL of the following 4 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 20
Rule [family:EmptyState]:
## EmptyState Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <EmptyState headerClassName={...} headingLevel={...} icon={...} isFullHeight={...} status={...} titleClassName={...} titleText={...} variant={...}>
    <EmptyStateBody />
    <EmptyStateFooter />
    <EmptyStateActions />
  </EmptyState>
```

Props that stay on <EmptyState>: headerClassName, headingLevel, icon, isFullHeight, status, titleClassName, titleText, variant

Add imports: EmptyStateBody, EmptyStateFooter, EmptyStateActions from '@patternfly/react-core'

Deprecated -> v6 migration:
  Old import: @patternfly/react-core
  New import: @patternfly/react-core
Matching props:
  className -> headerClassName (renamed, type unchanged)
  children -> status (TYPE CHANGED):
    old: React.ReactNode
    new: 'danger' | 'warning' | 'success' | 'info' | 'custom'
New props on replacement:
  isFullHeight: boolean
  variant: 'xs' | 'sm' | 'lg' | 'xl' | 'full'

Incidents found in this file:
  Line 20: [sd-cf-emptystate-emptystate-req-wrap]
    componentName: EmptyStateHeader
    module: @patternfly/react-core
    parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
    parentName: EmptyState
    Fix strategy:
      Strategy: LlmAssisted
      Component: EmptyState
      Replacement: EmptyStateBody

Code contexts:

   20        <EmptyStateHeader headingLevel="h4" titleText={<>{t('No Template found')}</>} />
   21        <EmptyStateBody>



Code context:
```
(no snippet)
```

### Fix 2
Line: 26
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: EmptyStateActions

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   25          <EmptyStateActions>
   26            <Button onClick={() => navigate(`/k8s/ns/${namespace}/catalog/template`)}>
   27              {t('Go to catalog')}

```

### Fix 3
Line: 19
Rule [sd-new-absorbing-prop-emptystate-titletext]:
Component <EmptyState> has a new prop `titleText` (type: `React.ReactNode`) added in v6 that accepts JSX content.

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <EmptyState> and determine if any should be moved to the `titleText` prop.

Example migration:
  Before: <EmptyState>{content} other children</EmptyState>
  After:  <EmptyState titleText=>other children</EmptyState>

Incident context:
  componentName: EmptyState
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: __ComponentReturn__

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: EmptyState
Prop: titleText
To: React.ReactNode

Code context:
```
   18    return (
   19      <EmptyState>
   20        <EmptyStateHeader headingLevel="h4" titleText={<>{t('No Template found')}</>} />

```

### Fix 4
Line: 11
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-emptystate-emptystateheader-d-ts-emptystateheaderprops-removed]:
Interface 'EmptyStateHeaderProps' was removed (interface): Exported interface `EmptyStateHeaderProps` was removed — migrate to `EmptyStateProps`.
  Matching props (use on `EmptyStateProps` instead): children, className, headingLevel, icon, titleClassName, titleText

File: packages/react-core/src/components/EmptyState/EmptyStateHeader.d.ts
Before: interface: EmptyStateHeaderProps

Incident context:
  importedName: EmptyStateHeader
  localName: EmptyStateHeader
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
From: EmptyStateHeaderProps
To: EmptyStateProps
Replacement: EmptyStateProps
Member mappings:
  titleText -> titleText
  headingLevel -> headingLevel
  icon -> icon
  titleClassName -> titleClassName
  className -> headerClassName
  children -> status

Code context:
```
   10    EmptyStateFooter,
   11    EmptyStateHeader,
   12  } from '@patternfly/react-core';

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/views/catalog/wizard/components/WizardEmptyState.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1 (Line 20) — EmptyStateHeader removal
`EmptyStateHeader` is removed in PF v6. Its props (`headingLevel`, `titleText`) should be moved directly onto `<EmptyState>`. The `<EmptyStateHeader>` line should be removed entirely.

### Fix 3 (Line 19) — `titleText` absorbing prop on EmptyState
The `titleText` prop from `EmptyStateHeader` needs to move to `<EmptyState>`. This is essentially the same migration as Fix 1 — the `titleText` content moves to `<EmptyState>`.

### Fix 4 (Line 11) — Remove `EmptyStateHeader` import
`EmptyStateHeader` is removed, so its import should be removed.

### Fix 2 (Line 26) — Button icon migration
Looking at the Button on line 26, it contains only text `{t('Go to catalog')}` — no icon element. So this fix doesn't actually apply to this Button instance (there's no icon to move). The Button is fine as-is.

Let me apply all changes:

1. **Remove `EmptyStateHeader` import** (Fix 4)
2. **Move `headingLevel` and `titleText` from `<EmptyStateHeader>` to `<EmptyState>`; remove the `<EmptyStateHeader>` line** (Fixes 1 & 3)
3. **Fix 2** — The Button on line 26 has no icon child, just text. No change needed.

Let me apply the changes:
Now let me verify the final file:
The file looks correct. Let me verify there are no companion test files:

No companion test files found. The final file is complete and correct.

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1 (Line 20 — EmptyStateHeader removal):** ✅ Applied. Removed `<EmptyStateHeader>` component and moved its `headingLevel="h4"` and `titleText={<>{t('No Template found')}</>}` props directly onto `<EmptyState>`, matching the v6 composition pattern where these props belong on the root `EmptyState` component.

2. **Fix 2 (Line 26 — Button icon-to-prop):** ⚠️ No change needed. The `<Button>` at this location contains only text children (`{t('Go to catalog')}`), not an icon element. No icon migration is required.

3. **Fix 3 (Line 19 — EmptyState titleText absorbing prop):** ✅ Applied (combined with Fix 1). The `titleText` value from the removed `<EmptyStateHeader>` was moved to `<EmptyState titleText={...}>` as part of the same migration.

4. **Fix 4 (Line 11 — EmptyStateHeader import removal):** ✅ Applied. Removed the `EmptyStateHeader` import from the `@patternfly/react-core` import block since the component is no longer used.

chunks.response:
No companion test files found. The final file is complete and correct.

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1 (Line 20 — EmptyStateHeader removal):** ✅ Applied. Removed `<EmptyStateHeader>` component and moved its `headingLevel="h4"` and `titleText={<>{t('No Template found')}</>}` props directly onto `<EmptyState>`, matching the v6 composition pattern where these props belong on the root `EmptyState` component.

2. **Fix 2 (Line 26 — Button icon-to-prop):** ⚠️ No change needed. The `<Button>` at this location contains only text children (`{t('Go to catalog')}`), not an icon element. No icon migration is required.

3. **Fix 3 (Line 19 — EmptyState titleText absorbing prop):** ✅ Applied (combined with Fix 1). The `titleText` value from the removed `<EmptyStateHeader>` was moved to `<EmptyState titleText={...}>` as part of the same migration.

4. **Fix 4 (Line 11 — EmptyStateHeader import removal):** ✅ Applied. Removed the `EmptyStateHeader` import from the `@patternfly/react-core` import block since the component is no longer used.
